purpose: Choose, install, validate, and prove the two non-overlapping Windows tmux launch modes.

selection.when: operator wants the prior dev workspace and conversation state
selection.contract: activate the existing marked frontend when present; otherwise attach one frontend to dev

selection.when: operator wants isolated work that must not display the prior dev session
selection.contract: allocate a new dev-N session and a separate WezTerm process

failureHandling: Do not fall back from new to continue.
Do not launch a second continue frontend when a marked one is detected.
Preserve legacy launchers and report them as non-authoritative.
Record plan/result artifacts under LOCALAPPDATA and return the exact artifact path.
